description_long: This object is a wooden barrel placed on a circular patch of grass bordered by stone, with a tall wooden post rising from the ground next to it. Draped over the top of the barrel is an orange and yellow checkered cloth, partially covering the barrel and hanging down one side. A candle in a holder sits atop the cloth, adding a decorative or functional element. The barrel itself is reinforced with dark metal hoops and has a classic staved construction. The post supports a black metal lantern hanging above, suggesting the object is part of a street or park setting. The overall scene is tidy and visually cohesive, with the barrel serving as a focal point beneath the lantern.
description: A wooden barrel with metal hoops, draped with a checkered cloth and topped with a candle, stands on a grassy patch next to a tall post with a hanging lantern.
description_view_0: The barrel is seen from the side, with the checkered cloth and candle clearly visible, and the lantern post rising behind it.
description_view_1: The barrel is viewed from the front, showing the cloth draped more symmetrically and the candle centered, with the post directly behind.
description_view_2: The barrel is partially obscured by the post, with the cloth hanging more to the left and the lantern visible above.
description_view_3: The back of the barrel is visible, with the cloth covering most of the top and the post in the foreground.
